title: rubus montanus var. fragrans
intro: Rubus montanus var. fragrans, also known as the fragrant mountain raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus montanus plant, which is a type of raspberry native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus montanus var. fragrans include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
